perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women are standing in a Costco warehouse aisle with the Costco logo at the top; they are smiling and talking to the camera. (2) They point towards a large stack of product boxes. (3) Close-ups of 'Viva Roasted Trail Mix' packaging are shown. (4) One woman is seen carrying a tall stack of the product boxes in the warehouse. (5) The scene shifts to an indoor kitchen/dining setting where the women display the boxes on a countertop. (6) A close-up of a Costco price tag shows a discount price of $439. (7) They open the individual small packets and pour the contents onto a blue plate, showing various nuts and dried fruits. (8) One woman is seen lying on an orange sofa with a small white dog while the other hands her a snack packet. (9) They demonstrate a 'hidden eating method' by pouring the trail mix into a bowl of white yogurt and eating it with a spoon. (10) The video ends with them holding the boxes and giving a thumbs up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music plays throughout. Two female voices are heard narrating in a high-pitched, energetic, and fast-paced tone. (2) Frequent sound effects like 'dings', 'pops', and 'cha-chings' accompany text appearances and scene transitions. (3) The sound of nuts clattering onto a ceramic plate is audible during the product display. (4) The narration remains continuous and enthusiastic, describing the benefits and the current sale price of the product. (5) The music fades out as the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' (Functional: Logo). (2) '不浪費年費 好市多必買推薦' (Hook: 'Don't waste the annual fee, Costco must-buy recommendation', Tone: Persuasive). (3) '內行的人都知道買這個' (Hook: 'Insiders all know to buy this', Tone: Exclusive). (4) '萬歲牌 總匯點心包' (Functional: Product name - Viva Roasted Trail Mix). (5) '現在折110元', '12/8-12/21', '限時特價439元' (Functional: Discount information, Tone: Urgent/Value). (6) '每包只要22元' (Functional: Unit price emphasis, Tone: Bargain). (7) '蔓越莓', '榛果', '綠葡萄乾', '南瓜籽仁' (Functional: Ingredient names). (8) '滿滿能量及幸福感' (Effect: 'Full of energy and happiness', Tone: Emotional). (9) '我的隱藏吃法是' (Hook: 'My hidden eating method is', Tone: Informative).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook in warehouse -> Value/Discount details -> Product feature demonstration -> Usage scenario at home -> Call to action.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and is wearing a brown layered dress with a black choker; the other has long dark hair and wears a white bucket hat with a logo and a black top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts in a crowded Costco warehouse with shelves and shoppers, then moves to a clean, modern kitchen with a grey countertop and a living room with an orange leather sofa.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio-style lighting and warehouse fluorescent light.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Value Evidence -> Benefit Demonstration -> Usage Inspiration -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to drive immediate sales of Viva Roasted Trail Mix at Costco by highlighting a significant limited-time discount. It uses a relatable 'insider recommendation' narrative to validate the purchase, showcases the product's nutritional variety and convenient packaging, and provides a creative serving suggestion (mixing with yogurt) to broaden the product's appeal beyond simple snacking.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators are holding the product throughout the video, explicitly mentioning price discounts, dates, and brand names.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy fast-cut editing style typical of Taiwanese lifestyle influencers on platforms like Instagram Reels or TikTok.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the 'Costco Membership Value' trope, which is highly effective in East Asian markets where consumers seek to maximize the utility of their paid retail memberships.
